title: Embedded git repo cleanup in forge/pgvector and thrawn/
context: Daily Workspace Backup emits non-fatal warnings because forge/pgvector and thrawn/ are embedded git repositories. forge/pgvector triggers 'warning: adding embedded git repository'; thrawn/ triggers 'error: does not have a commit checked out / fatal: adding files failed' because its .git/ has no commits. Note: backup.sh:30 runs `git add -A` without redirecting stderr, so warnings appear on the launching terminal and are NOT captured in backup.log — a separate latent bug, out of scope per task rules.

directories.purpose: Vendored clone of upstream pgvector (https://github.com/pgvector/pgvector.git). Referenced from forge/RULES.md as the reference extension build sources for the platform's pgvector integration.
directories.warning_triggered_by_parent: warning: adding embedded git repository: forge/pgvector

resolution_options.verdict: REJECT — the inner .git/ is what triggers the warning; submodule does not silence it without the parent already having a gitlink, which it does not.
RECOMMENDED — add /forge/pgvector/ to parent .gitignore. Non-destructive, preserves upstream history, silences warning.
REJECTED for forge/pgvector — destroys all upstream history and the ability to ever pull from upstream again (irreversible).

directories.purpose: Another agent's workspace (separate AGENTS.md, BOOTSTRAP.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, USER.md, state/). Sibling agent scratchpad living under the parent workspace root — not part of the parent's source tree.
directories.warning_triggered_by_parent: error: 'thrawn/' does not have a commit checked out / fatal: adding files failed

resolution_options.verdict: RECOMMENDED — add /thrawn/ to parent .gitignore. Preserves agent workspace, silences fatal error.
ACCEPTABLE alternative — .git/ has no commits, deletion is harmless and converts the fatal error into a regular add. IGNORE preferred for policy consistency with forge/pgvector.

global_decision: IGNORE BOTH — append /forge/pgvector/ and /thrawn/ to /Users/ainchorsangiefpl/.openclaw/workspace/.gitignore. Rationale: (a) non-destructive, (b) uniform policy, (c) preserves forge/pgvector's full upstream clone history, (d) preserves thrawn/ for its resident agent, (e) silences the embedded-repo warning and the fatal 'does not have a commit checked out' error from `git add -A` in backup.sh.
out_of_scope: backup.sh:30 silently swallows git add stderr — separate bug, ticket rules forbid modifying backup.sh
forge/ itself is ALSO an embedded git repo with no commits — not in TKT-0539 scope but worth flagging
Converting forge/pgvector to a true submodule — adds coupling without silencing the warning

verifier_setup.B_cmd: grep -E '(forge/pgvector|thrawn)' ~/Backups/ainchors/logs/backup.log | grep -iE 'embedded|does not have a commit|fatal: adding files failed' | wc -l
verifier_setup.B_note: Always 0 because backup.sh:30 does not redirect git stderr to the log; this verifier is informational. Authoritative warning capture happens live during the operator's run.
